use_codes.desc: USE OF A LOTION CONTAINING HALOBETASOL PROPIONATE FOR THE TREATMENT OF CORTICOSTEROID-RESPONSIVE DERMATOSES INCLUDING PSORIASIS

indications.text:
ULTRAVATE lotion is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in patients
eighteen (18) years of age and older.

ULTRAVATE lotion is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in patients 12 years of age
and older.
